seo.title: Khalid Xaifi - Creative Technologist
seo.description: Khalid Xaifi - Creative Technologist focused on AI, robotics, automation, interface design, editing, and visual storytelling.

profile.name: Khalid Xaifi
profile.summary:
I am Khalid Xaifi, a self-learning Creative Technologist from Lucknow, India. My work connects AI systems, robotics, embedded automation, interface design, editing, and visual storytelling.

I build practical systems with a strong visual identity - from ESP32-based machines and AI assistant concepts to editorial websites, motion interfaces, and product-style presentations.

hero.title: Khalid.
hero.description: I design practical, intelligent, and visually premium systems across AI, robotics, automation, UI design, and creative media.

about.title:
ABOUT
ME
paragraphs: I'm building my direction around the intersection of technology and visual design. My work is focused on practical systems - machines, assistants, interfaces, and creative tools - that are useful first and visually refined second.
I like turning rough technical ideas into clear systems: planning the logic, building the interface, testing the workflow, and presenting the result with strong visual identity.

projectsIntro.note: Selected systems and interfaces that show how I connect technical logic with visual presentation.

projects.title: AXIS- Personal AI OS
projects.description: A personal AI ecosystem concept with voice interaction, desktop interface, memory, PC tools, automation, visual context, and future robotics/IoT control.

projects.title: WCM- An Industrial Wire Cutting Machine
projects.description: An ESP32-based automatic wire cutting machine for controlled feeding and batch cutting with stepper feed, servo cutting, LCD menu, calibration, and quantity workflow.

projects.title: OBY- An Obstacle Avoidance Robot
projects.description: An Arduino Uno-based autonomous robot that navigates its environment by detecting and maneuvering around physical barriers.

axis.headline:
System
Details
axis.description: AXIS is my personal AI ecosystem concept - designed as a compact, intelligent workspace that can connect voice, PC tools, memory, automation, visual context, and future robotics/IoT control.

detailStrip.label: Current Build Focus
detailStrip.text: Voice interaction, dashboard UI, memory planning, automation logic, PC tools, and modular structure.

detailStrip.label: Design Principle
detailStrip.text: Useful first, visually refined second - every feature should work practically and feel clear.

detailStrip.label: Next Direction
detailStrip.text: More stable assistant behavior, better project memory, and future robotics/IoT connection.
